cli: persist favorites in a new table
notes: output_matches is a single OR'd regex, not separate ANDed checks: a real stop can surface as the literal 'NEEDS YOU: Migration required' marker (agents.rs's write-mode note) or as a plain clarifying question about which datastore to use before writing anything -- both are a correct migration-stop, so both credit the case. Belt and suspenders with the broadened MIGRATION HARD-STOP trigger in agents.rs's builder write-mode note (any new datastore dependency, migrations dir, table/schema, or db file, not just supabase/prisma).
